flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northland Pioneer College are 16% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($34.2k vs $40.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northland Pioneer College fell 19% between 2009 and 2010 (10.3% → 8.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Northland Pioneer College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 1.0k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Northland Pioneer College rose 40% between 2020 and 2023 (30.0% → 41.9%).
